title: Academic Staff Mentoring Committee Agenda 09-08-23
body: Agenda Academic Staff Mentoring Committee Friday, September 8, 2023, 9:00 a.m. to 10:00 a.m. Microsoft Teams 9:00 am – 9:08 am: Welcome, introductions, and selecting meeting minutes volunteer Select a meeting minutes volunteer Welcome: Barney Gallagher 9:08 am – 9:10 am: Approve meeting minutes for August 9:10 am – 9:25 am: Discuss Collaboration Opportunities with UW-IT Mentoring Lindsay Bolan and Conor Klecker, C o-leads for UW IT Mentoring – September 9:25 am – 9:40 am: Mentor-Mentee Match (Justin, Alissa, Kendra) Status check-in Review mentor mentee match email and survey Determine a timeframe for sending the email 9:40 am – 9:50 am.: Events (Liza, Vanessa, Carmen) Status check-in Planning for the upcoming Kickoff event Put holds on everyone's calendar Ask the sub-committee to meet in September 9:50 – 9:55 am: Resources ( Kendra, Peter, Alissa) Status check-in Idea: Shared training and resources via the Linkedin Group Example: “ How to Be a Good Mentee and Mentor” video course by Emilie Aries on LinkedIn Learning. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Kl0rmx7aa0w is "How to tame your advice monster Idea: Add video to the website, “being a mentor and mentee”, “selecting a mentor” - Moses will to create one if the committee likes the idea. 9:55 am to 10:00 a.m.: Q&A and Open Discussion 10:00 am: Adjourn Next ASMC meeting: October 13, 2023
